data.title: They Turned Fruit Bouquets Into A $500 Million-A-Year Business—Now They're Selling THC. Here's Why
data.description: Edible Arrangements' parent company just launched a THC marketplace, Edibles.com. Here's why it's betting big on hemp-derived wellness.

data.title: What's Going On With Conduent Stock On Wednesday?
data.description: Conduent shares fall after Q1 sales miss estimates despite a narrower EPS loss and reaffirms FY2025 guidance of $3.10–$3.25 billion.

data.title: Office Depot CEO Says It Can Mitigate Potential Tariffs Impact After Q1 Profit Dip
data.description: ODP Corporation (NASDAQ:ODP) shares rise after Q1 FY25 earnings beat. Revenue fell 9.2% YoY to $1.70B but topped the $1.67B estimate. Despite a drop in gross profit and an operating loss of $32M, adjusted EPS of $1.06 exceeded expectations.

data.title: Fed Keeps Rates Steady, Warns Of Rising 'Uncertainty About The Economic Outlook'
CRISPR Therapeutics' Data Shows Promise, But RFK Jr. Appointee Could Be Negative: Analyst
data.description: CRISPR reports data showing dose-dependent lipid reduction and strong safety, with plans to present full results in late 2025.
